title: Alphabet Company Overview
text: Alphabet Inc. is the parent company of Google and operates primarily through Google Services, Google Cloud, and Other Bets. Google Services includes major products and platforms such as Search, YouTube, Android, Chrome, Gmail, Google Maps, Google Play, devices, subscriptions, and advertising products. Google Cloud provides cloud infrastructure, cybersecurity, databases, analytics, AI infrastructure, AI solutions, and Google Workspace productivity tools for enterprise customers. Other Bets includes earlier-stage businesses such as Waymo and other long-term technology projects. Alphabet's business model is heavily supported by digital advertising, but the company is also expanding through cloud computing, subscriptions, AI products, hardware, and autonomous transportation. For investment analysis, Alphabet is important because it combines a highly profitable advertising business with fast-growing cloud and AI opportunities, while also facing significant regulatory and antitrust risks.
